---
title: "Step 6. Calculate Condition at project start (year 0)"
format: html
---

The following arithmetic mean equation was followed to calculate the condition of the indicators at project start. $$
C_0 = \frac{\frac{St_1 + St_2 + \cdots + St_n}{n} + \frac{Cm_1 + Cm_2 + \cdots + Cm_n}{n}}{2}
$$

Where:

-   $C_0$ = Condition at project start (Year 0)\
-   $St$ = Standardized structure indicator at project start (year 0) (calculated as SI0 in Step 5)\
-   $Cm$ = Standardized composition indicator at project start (year 0) (calculated as SI0 in Step 5)\
-   $n$ = Total number of structure and composition indicators

<br>

The calculation can be found below:

$$
\frac{\left(\frac{0.812 + 0.833}{2}\right) + \left(\frac{0.511 + 0.935 + 0.674}{3}\right)}{2}=0.76
$$

[Table 13](#table13) demonstrates the values for each component of the calculation:

<details>

<summary>Table 13. Condition at Project Start</summary>

::::{#table13}
::::

<div class="terra-table-title">
Table 13. Condition at Project Start
</div>

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(DT)

table_data <- data.frame(
  check.names = FALSE,
  
  `Ecosystem Type` = c(
    "Subtropical Dry Forests"
  ),
  
  Cm1 = c("0.51"),
  Cm2 = c("0.93"),
  Cm3 = c("0.67"),
  St1 = c("0.71"),
  St2 = c("0.74"),
  Cm0 = c("0.71"),
  St0 = c("0.72"),
  C0  = c("0.72")
)

datatable(
  table_data,
  options = list(
    paging = FALSE,
    searching = FALSE,
    info = FALSE,
    ordering = FALSE,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    autoWidth = FALSE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all")
    )
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "stripe hover compact"
)
```

</details>
